name: @whystack/markdown-renderer
description: Parses educational Markdown into a token tree, and renders it with design tokens. One parse, two renderers: React Native and (later) the static site.
//exports: Two entry points, and the split is the design. `.` is the PARSER: pure TypeScript, no React, no React Native — so the Astro site (which ships zero JavaScript) can consume the same tree at build time. `./native` is the renderer, and it is the only half that knows what a View is.
